ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol associated with the plant species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the plant, including author */,
  "state_common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant in different states */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family classification of the plant */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the plant */,
  "species_author" TEXT /* Author of the scientific name */,
  "subspecies" TEXT /* Subspecies of the plant */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the plant */,
  "form" TEXT /* Form of the plant */,
  "common_name_region" TEXT /* Region where the common name is used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the plant */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Information about the plant's distribution */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the plant */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_family FOREIGN KEY ("family") REFERENCES plant_families ("family_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym entry */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant species id */,
  "synonym_symbol" TEXT /* Synonym symbol associated with the plant */,
  "synonym_author" TEXT /* Author of the synonym */,
  "synonym_type" TEXT /* Type of synonym (accepted, rejected) */,
  "synonym_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the synonym */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synonyms_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the plant family */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)
